source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre Canva layout redesign

subject: Kingship Christian Centre Canva designs
value: Spacing must feel deliberate and clean rather than sloppy. Colours may vary from page to page but must remain within the Kingship brand, and each page should use a distinct composition instead of repeating one layout.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre Canva layout redesign
Kingship Christian Centre Canva layout redesign

value.vision: Editorial composition with a large title on the left and visual on the right.
value.mission: Reversed composition with the visual on the upper left and a right-aligned title and overview.
value.values: Centred headline composition with a centred visual and supporting copy arranged beneath and to the right.
value.mandate: Wide gold one-line headline with a small corner visual and a split text layout.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre Canva layout redesign

subject: Kingship Christian Centre vision
value: To see Jesus Christ revealed and honoured as King over every heart, every home, every campus, every community, and every nation, raising a generation of Spirit-filled disciples who know Him deeply, worship Him passionately, live courageously according to biblical truth, and reflect His character in every area of life. We envision believers who strengthen marriages and families, serve others with compassion, lead with integrity, pursue excellence in their God-given calling, and carry the transforming power of the Gospel into churches, schools, workplaces, creative spaces, communities, and nations.

source.conversation_topic: Expanding Kingship Christian Centre vision, mission, values, and mandate copy

subject: Kingship Christian Centre mission
value: Kingship Christian Centre exists to lead people into a genuine, personal, and life-transforming relationship with Jesus Christ, helping them know Him not only as Saviour, but also as Lord and King over every area of their lives. We are committed to teaching the uncompromised Word of God with clarity and practical relevance, cultivating a strong culture of prayer and Spirit-filled worship, and equipping believers to discover, develop, and fulfil their God-given purpose. We seek to strengthen marriages and families, raise mature disciples and courageous leaders, restore broken lives, and serve communities with compassion through practical outreach, generosity, and the transforming power of the Gospel.

source.conversation_topic: Expanding Kingship Christian Centre vision, mission, values, and mandate copy

subject: Kingship Christian Centre values
value: Our values define the culture we build, the way we serve, the decisions we make, and the standard by which we lead. They shape how we worship, communicate, develop people, and represent Jesus Christ in every area of ministry. They keep Kingship Christian Centre Christ-centred, biblically grounded, spiritually alive, compassionate, relationally healthy, and committed to excellence and integrity. They call us to lead with humility, serve with love, pursue unity, honour people, remain accountable, and faithfully steward every gift and opportunity God places in our hands. Through them, we seek to build a Kingdom culture where disciples mature, families are strengthened, generosity is practised, and everything brings glory to God.

subject: Kingship Christian Centre discipleship
value: The goal is not merely to gather a crowd, but to cultivate mature, grounded believers who know God deeply, live with integrity, serve others faithfully, and reflect the character of Jesus wherever they go.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre values and discipleship outcome

subject: Kingship Christian Centre ministry
value: Prayer fuels revival.
Worship reveals God's glory.
People are transformed by God's presence.
Students become courageous leaders.
Marriages and families are strengthened.
Gifts and callings are developed.
Believers are equipped to serve with purpose.
Compassionate outreach, practical support, and the Gospel bring lasting change to lives, homes, campuses, and communities.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre envisioned ministry outcomes

value.description: Ground them in the truth of God's Word and disciple them into spiritual maturity.
Equip them through prayer, practical training, mentorship, service opportunities, and gift development.
Send them to influence campuses, families, workplaces, creative industries, and communities with the character, compassion, and message of Jesus Christ.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Christian Centre discipleship and sending pathway

subject: Kingship Christian Centre mandate
value: Our mandate is to establish a strong, Kingdom-centred ministry that raises mature and Spirit-filled disciples, restores broken lives and strengthens families, develops godly leaders, and advances a vibrant culture of prayer, worship, and biblical truth. We are called to reach and equip the next generation, help believers discover and fulfil their God-given purpose, and create meaningful opportunities for service, leadership, and spiritual growth. Through compassionate outreach, creative ministry, and faithful witness, we carry the transforming message of the Gospel beyond the walls of the church into campuses, homes, workplaces, creative industries, communities, and nations.

source.conversation_topic: Expanding Kingship Christian Centre mandate copy

subject: Kingship Christian Centre mandate
value: Build strong and consistent prayer altars.
Equip worshippers to minister with skill and spiritual depth.
Disciple students into courageous followers of Christ.
Restore and strengthen marriages and families through biblical guidance and support.
Train creatives, leaders, and ministry workers.
Serve communities through compassionate outreach.
Produce Kingdom-centred media, music, and resources with excellence.
Establish healthy, accountable, sustainable ministries that can grow, reproduce, and multiply across communities and generations.
